title: Chore: Add New Relic monitoring
original_text: Added New Relic monitoring integration. Implemented APM for application performance monitoring. Added infrastructure monitoring with New Relic Infrastructure. Implemented browser monitoring for frontend. Added custom dashboards and alerts. Result: New Relic monitoring operational.
expected_body_lines: - Implement APM for application performance monitoring
- Add infrastructure monitoring with New Relic Infrastructure
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(monitoring): add New Relic monitoring"
